Updates to Currency Ordering
We updated the sections listed below to clarify procedures.
Currency Volume
Currency Ordering Part
Section 6.4, Modifying Cash Services User Profiles
We added a step to indicate that you should select âAllâ as the status when searching for a userâs profile; otherwise, the results will not include users whose profile is locked.
Section 9.5, Handling Discrepancies in Incoming Cash Parcels
We clarified content to reflect that if a cash parcel is short or over a whole bundle, you must submit the
parcel tag
so that RBC can see which financial institution it came from. If a discrepancy doesnât constitute a whole bundle, you must submit the
bundle strap
so that RBC can see which financial institution it came from.
Section 10.11, Handling Counterfeit Bank Notes Received on Deposit
We clarified that your local police department (or the RCMP, if you donât have local police) will provide directions on how to proceed if you receive counterfeit bank notes on deposit. The instructions may vary by region.
